payload.title: the seed format upgrades itself
payload.text: Growing from a holistic spec needs ZERO kernel change. A planted grow-spec command logs the spec (seed.spec, provenance) and calls the brain to derive the atomic command.declared/projector.declared events; the kernel's existing strange-loop hook compiles them into scripts. So the higher-level seed format is itself a seed — the system teaching itself to read specs. Test: re-express the board capability as one holistic spec doc and grow it through grow-spec, deriving the 4 declarations (no hand-written declarations), with the kernel untouched.

payload.name: grow-spec
payload.description: Compile a holistic capability spec into self declarations. The argument is a file path (or inline text) of a spec with Intent/Capabilities/Behavior/Examples sections. Log the spec as seed.spec for provenance, then call the brain (self think) to derive the command.declared and projector.declared events for every capability in the spec and emit them — the kernel compiles them via the strange loop.

params.spec: file path or inline spec text
